data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of including a photo/video release within the same form as the liability waiver. However, the evidence does not confirm that this specific requirement is met, as it only mentions the inclusion of a photo/video release without demonstrating its presence in the actual form or through API reads. The linked use case states the need for a photo/video release but lacks concrete evidence that this requirement is implemented, leading to a clear gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence that the photo/video release is included in the same form as the liability waiver.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify photo/video release inclusion
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the photo/video release is part of the waiver form.
